Dykk Harlaw

Winterfell
Book A Clash of Kings (appears)

Dykk Harlaw is an ironborn raider from House Harlaw.[1] His relation to Lord Rodrik Harlaw, the head of the house, is currently unknown.

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Clash of Kings

Recent Events[ ]

A Clash of Kings[ ]

Dykk is among the ironborn who participate in the capture of Winterfell by Theon Greyjoy. Ser Rodrik Cassel leads a northern host to retake the castle. When Theon asks the assembled ironmen to remain and fight alongside him, Dykk spits at the ground.[1] Four Harlaws remain with Theon and are slain during the sack of Winterfell by House Bolton;[1] it is unknown if Gevin and Dykk are among them or if they are among the ironborn who abandon Theon beforehand.
